entities.name: SOUTHERN MALI
entities.description: The region in Mali where the study on farming risks was conducted

entities.name: COTTON
entities.description: The primary crop grown in the specific zone of Mali investigated

entities.name: FARMING RISKS
entities.description: The perceived hazards and their impacts on food availability and income faced by smallholder farmers

entities.name: ADAPTIVE CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of farmers to adjust to and manage risks

entities.name: RESOURCE ENDOWMENT
entities.description: The assets and resources available to farms, which influence risk exposure and perception

entities.name: INTRA HOUSEHOLD DIVERSITY
entities.description: The differences in perception and risk management among members of the same household

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: A qualitative data collection method used to gather information on risk perception

entities.name: SURVEY
entities.description: A quantitative data collection method involving 250 people from 58 households

entities.name: FOOD AVAILABILITY
entities.description: One of the key metrics used to assess the impact of farming risks

entities.name: INCOME
entities.description: One of the key metrics used to assess the impact of farming risks

entities.name: ANIMAL HEALTH HAZARDS
entities.description: Risks related to the health of livestock

entities.name: PERSONAL HEALTH HAZARDS
entities.description: Risks related to the health of the farmers and their families

entities.name: CLIMATE VARIABILITY
entities.description: Risks associated with unpredictable weather patterns

entities.name: GENERATIONAL FACTOR
entities.description: A factor within households that influences the perception of risks

entities.name: DECISION POWER
entities.description: The authority to make choices within a household, which correlates with higher risk concern

entities.name: GENDER
entities.description: A demographic factor analyzed but found not to influence risk perception in this study

entities.name: MEDICAL ACTIONS
entities.description: Coping strategies targeted at human and animal health hazards

entities.name: FIELD AND ANIMAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Adjustments in farming and livestock handling to cope with hazards

entities.name: ADAPTED CONSUMPTION RATES
entities.description: A coping strategy involving changes in food consumption to manage risk

entities.name: SOCIAL INTERACTIONS
entities.description: The use of social networks and support systems to cope with hazards

entities.name: SOCIAL WELL-BEING
entities.description: A desired outcome of combined agronomic and economic development interventions

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: A desired outcome of combined agronomic and economic development interventions
